If you're new to crypto trading, don't let the 1 minute chart control your emotions. I spent too much time chasing every little move and ended up making costly mistakes. The moment I shifted my attention to higher timeframes and started understanding market structure and institutional flow, everything changed. My trades improved, my confidence grew, and the stress faded. Trading is 90% patience and 10% execution master the patience, and the execution becomes much easier. I make €43.600 in a month

Trading advice for anyone new to crypto: try not to focus too much on the 1-minute charts. When I first started trading, I made the mistake of reacting to every small price movement, and it cost me a lot of money. Constantly watching the smallest timeframes can create unnecessary stress and lead to impulsive decisions.
